title: He Who Must Die
writer: Ben Barzman, Jules Dassin, Nikos Kazantzakis
actors: Jean Servais, Carl Möhner, Grégoire Aslan
plot: After WW1,ordinary citizens of a small Greek village plays the Passion Play in order to rebel against Turkish rulers during Turkish-Greek relations in 1920's.
awards: Nominated for 1 BAFTA Award2 wins & 3 nominations total
